metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5149
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1, 2: PDLIM5 (aka. ENH, Enigma Homolog) and SPAR (Spine-Associated RapGAP, gene SIPA1L1) co-immunoprecipitated and interacted in yeast two-hybrid.

Figure 4: Cultured hippocampal neurons at 19DIV were immunostained for endogenous PDLIM5, PSD95 (DLG4), synaptophysin (SYP) and GAD65 (GAD2). PDLIM5 partially co-localized with both pre- and post-synaptic marker proteins SYP and DLG4 but not inhibitory synapse marker GAD65.

Figure 8: postsynaptic localization of PDLIM5 is increased upon PKC activation in cultured hippocampal neurons at 27DIV.. Experimental description: M&M:
"For spine morphology studies, hippocampal primary neuronal cultures prepared from embryonic day (E) 18-19 rat embryos were plated at high density (~750 cells mm-2)"

antibody:
"PDLIM5 antibodies GU8 were produced by immunization of rabbits with pMal-PDLIM5 PDZ domain (Cocalico Biologicals)."

constructs:
"PDLIM5a, PDLIM5b, and Enigma cDNAs were obtained by PCR from a rat brain Marathon cDNA library using amino- and carboxy-terminus primers and cloned into vector HA-GW1 or myc-GW1. Deletion constructs were generated by PCR with appropriate primers. For PDLIM5 and Enigma deletions in pGAD10, regions are denoted in Fig. 1A. HA-PDLIM5aΔLIM in GW1 lacks aa477-497. Deletions for SPAR-Act2 domain cloned in pBHA were ΔN (aa 1313-1505), ΔNC (aa 1313-1415) and ΔC (1216-1415)."
